# Baton Rouge

> Geotechnical engineering company in United States, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Cbr Study Road Design](https://baton-rouge.geotechnicalengineering1.org/cbr-study-road-design/)
- [Cone Penetration](https://baton-rouge.geotechnicalengineering1.org/cone-penetration/)
- [Contaminated Soil Remediation](https://baton-rouge.geotechnicalengineering1.org/contaminated-soil-remediation/)
- [Deep Soil Mixing](https://baton-rouge.geotechnicalengineering1.org/deep-soil-mixing/)
- [Direct Shear](https://baton-rouge.geotechnicalengineering1.org/direct-shear/)
- [Driven Pile Design](https://baton-rouge.geotechnicalengineering1.org/driven-pile-design/)
- [Dynamic Compaction Design](https://baton-rouge.geotechnicalengineering1.org/dynamic-compaction-design/)

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in United States.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
